description_long: This is an ornate, historical-style lamp with a tall, conical spire topped by a finial. The upper section features intricate metalwork with open lattice patterns and decorative motifs, giving it a gothic or neo-gothic appearance. The midsection is supported by a robust, circular base adorned with sculpted reliefs and figures, possibly depicting mythological or allegorical scenes. The base is set on a round plinth with three prominent columns, each with detailed capitals and bases. The lamp's surface shows a mix of weathered stone and metal, with some areas displaying a bronze or gold patina. The overall design suggests it is a monumental street or park lamp, likely intended as a decorative focal point in a public space.
description: A tall, ornate lamp with a spired top, intricate metal latticework, and a sculpted stone base featuring reliefs and columns. The lamp has a weathered, historical appearance with metallic and stone finishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed reliefs and columns on the base, with the spired top and open metalwork clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the sculpted figures and the circular plinth, with the spire and latticework prominent.
description_view_2: The base appears more golden-bronze in this view, emphasizing the metallic patina and the three-column support.
description_view_3: This side reveals more of the open latticework and the rounded base, with less emphasis on the sculpted figures.
